changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.rollback: delete from configuration where key IN ('ui.features.unaHideNotifyOperator', 'ui.features.feesInvoicesHideMenu');

changeSet.author: loukerip

changeSet.rollback: delete from configuration where key IN ('ui.features.hideNotes', 'ui.features.hideFacilityAudit');

changeSet.author: loukerip@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into configuration(key, value, type) values ('ui.features.unaVariationHideStartTask', true, 'BOOLEAN')
changeSet.rollback: delete from configuration where key IN ('ui.features.unaVariationHideStartTask');

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
